Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** ******************************************

Direct implementation of binary coproducts togther with:

- Proof that binary coproduct(cocone) is a property in a univalent_category ([isaprop_BinCoproductCocone])
- Specialized versions of beta rules for coproducts
- Definition of binary coproduct functor ([bincoproduct_functor])
- Definition of a coproduct structure on a functor category by taking pointwise coproducts in the
  target category ([BinCoproducts_functor_precat])
- Definition of the option functor ([option_functor])
- Binary coproducts from colimits ([BinCoproducts_from_Colims])
- Equivalent universal property: (A --> C) × (B --> C) ≃ (A + B --> C)
- The type of coproducts on a given diagram is a proposition
- Associativity
- Distribution over a functor
- Stability under isomorphic objects

Written by Benedikt Ahrens, March 2015
Extended by Anders Mörtberg and Tomi Pannila, 2016
Extended by Langston Barrett (@siddharthist), 2018
Extended by Ralph Matthes, 2023
Extended by Kobe Wullaert, 2025

*********************************************)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.ProductCategory.

Local Open Scope cat.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Definition of binary coproduct of objects in a precategory *)
Section coproduct_def.

Context (C : category).

Definition isBinCoproduct (a b co : C) (ia : a --> co) (ib : b --> co) :=
  ∏ (c : C) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> c),
  ∃! (fg : co --> c), (ia · fg = f) × (ib · fg = g).


C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isaprop (isBinCoproduct a b co ia ib)


C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isaprop (isBinCoproduct a b co ia ib)

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
∏ t : C,
isaprop
  (∏ (f : C ⟦ a, t ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, t ⟧),
   ∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = f × ib · fg = g)
 
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
t: C
isaprop
  (∏ (f : C ⟦ a, t ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, t ⟧),
   ∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = f × ib · fg = g)

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
t: C
∏ t0 : C ⟦ a, t ⟧,
isaprop
  (∏ g : C ⟦ b, t ⟧,
   ∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = t0 × ib · fg = g)
 
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
t: C
t0: C ⟦ a, t ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ g : C ⟦ b, t ⟧,
   ∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = t0 × ib · fg = g)

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
t: C
t0: C ⟦ a, t ⟧
∏ t1 : C ⟦ b, t ⟧,
isaprop
  (∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = t0 × ib · fg = t1)
 
C: category
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
t: C
t0: C ⟦ a, t ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, t ⟧
isaprop
  (∃! fg : C ⟦ co, t ⟧, ia · fg = t0 × ib · fg = g)

  apply isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition BinCoproduct (a b : C) :=
   ∑ coiaib : (∑ co : C, a --> co × b --> co),
      isBinCoproduct a b (pr1 coiaib) (pr1 (pr2 coiaib)) (pr2 (pr2 coiaib)).

Definition BinCoproducts := ∏ (a b : C), BinCoproduct a b.
Definition hasBinCoproducts := ∏ (a b : C), ∥ BinCoproduct a b ∥.

Definition BinCoproductObject {a b : C} (CC : BinCoproduct a b) : C := pr1 (pr1 CC).
Coercion BinCoproductObject : BinCoproduct >-> ob.
Definition BinCoproductIn1 {a b : C} (CC : BinCoproduct a b): a --> BinCoproductObject CC :=
  pr1 (pr2 (pr1 CC)).
Definition BinCoproductIn2 {a b : C} (CC : BinCoproduct a b) : b --> BinCoproductObject CC :=
   pr2 (pr2 (pr1 CC)).


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
isBinCoproduct a b CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC)


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
isBinCoproduct a b CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC)

  exact (pr2 CC).
Defined.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
C ⟦ CC, c ⟧


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
C ⟦ CC, c ⟧

  exact (pr1 (pr1 (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct CC _ f g))).
Defined.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = f


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = f

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = f

  exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct CC _ f g)))).
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = g


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = g

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CC · BinCoproductArrow CC f g = g

  exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct CC _ f g)))).
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
k: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = f
→ BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = g
  → k = BinCoproductArrow CC f g


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
k: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = f
→ BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = g
  → k = BinCoproductArrow CC f g

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
k: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = f
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = g
k = BinCoproductArrow CC f g

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
k: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = f
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = g
H:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2: ∑ h : C ⟦ CC, x ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 CC · h = f
× BinCoproductIn2 CC · h = g
k = BinCoproductArrow CC f g

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
k: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = f
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = g
H:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2: ∑ h : C ⟦ CC, x ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 CC · h = f
× BinCoproductIn2 CC · h = g
H':= pr2 (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct CC x f g) H: H = pr1 (isBinCoproduct_BinCoproduct CC x f g)
k = BinCoproductArrow CC f g

  apply (base_paths _ _ H').
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
→ BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
  → k1 = k2


C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
→ BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
  → k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductArrow CC p1 p2 = k2
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = p1

c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d

p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧

C: category
c, d: C

H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2

p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
k2 = BinCoproductArrow CC p1 p2

C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = p1
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = p2
 
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = p1
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = p2

  
C: category
c, d: C
CC: BinCoproduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn1 CC · k2
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = BinCoproductIn2 CC · k2
p1:= BinCoproductIn1 CC · k1: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
p2:= BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CC · k1 = p2
 apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
f =
BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC · f)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC · f)


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
x: C
f: C ⟦ CC, x ⟧
f =
BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC · f)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC · f)

  apply BinCoproductArrowUnique;
  apply idpath.
Qed.


Definition BinCoproductOfArrows {a b : C} (CCab : BinCoproduct a b) {c d : C}
    (CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> d) :
          BinCoproductObject CCab --> BinCoproductObject CCcd :=
    BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd) (g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd).


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd)
    (g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd) =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd

  apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd)
    (g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd) =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd

  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.



C: category
a, b: C
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
isBinCoproduct a b c f g → BinCoproduct a b


C: category
a, b: C
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
isBinCoproduct a b c f g → BinCoproduct a b

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
BinCoproduct a b

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
(λ coiaib : ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧,
 isBinCoproduct a b (pr1 coiaib) (pr12 coiaib)
   (pr22 coiaib)) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
C ⟦ b, c ⟧

    exact g.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
X: isBinCoproduct a b c f g
(λ coiaib : ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧,
 isBinCoproduct a b (pr1 coiaib) (pr12 coiaib)
   (pr22 coiaib)) (c,, f,, g)
 apply X.
Defined.


C: category
hsC: has_homsets C
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
(∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 ∃! k : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, ia · k = f × ib · k = g)
→ isBinCoproduct a b co ia ib


C: category
hsC: has_homsets C
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
(∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 ∃! k : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, ia · k = f × ib · k = g)
→ isBinCoproduct a b co ia ib

  
C: category
hsC: has_homsets C
a, b, co: C
ia: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
ib: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
H: ∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, ia · k = f × ib · k = g
c: C
cc: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
∏ g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧,
∃! fg : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, ia · fg = cc × ib · fg = g

  apply H.
Defined.




C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
   · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h) = f · k
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
   · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h) = 
g · h

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
   · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h) = f · k
 
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h = f · k
 
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
f · k

    
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
f · k = f · k

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows CCab CCcd f g
   · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h) = g · h
 
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
g · h

    
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c, d: C
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
g · h = g · h

    apply idpath.
Qed.



C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)


C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· (BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k) = f · k
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· (BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k) = 
g · k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· (BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k) = f · k
  rewrite assoc, BinCoproductIn1Commutes;
     apply idpath.
  
C: category
a, b: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· (BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k) = g · k
  rewrite assoc, BinCoproductIn2Commutes;
     apply idpath.
Qed.




C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
identity CC = k


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
t1 = t2
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
X': t1 = t2
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
t1 = t2
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
iscontr X
 apply H'. 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
X': t1 = t2
identity CC = k

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
k: C ⟦ CC, CC ⟧
H1: BinCoproductIn1 CC · k = BinCoproductIn1 CC
H2: BinCoproductIn2 CC · k = BinCoproductIn2 CC
H':= pr2 CC CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
  (BinCoproductIn2 CC): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC
X:= ∑ fg : C ⟦ pr11 CC, CC ⟧,
pr121 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn1 CC
× pr221 CC · fg = BinCoproductIn2 CC: Type
t1:= k,, make_dirprod H1 H2 : X: X
t2:= identity (pr11 CC),,
make_dirprod (id_right (pr121 CC))
  (id_right (pr221 CC))
:
X: X
X': t1 = t2
k = identity CC

  apply (base_paths _ _ X').
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
identity CC


C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
identity CC

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
BinCoproductIn1 CC
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
BinCoproductIn2 CC

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
BinCoproductIn1 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
?b
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
?b = BinCoproductIn1 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
?b
 apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1. 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
identity a · BinCoproductIn1 CC = BinCoproductIn1 CC

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
BinCoproductIn2 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
?b
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
?b = BinCoproductIn2 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· BinCoproductOfArrows CC CC (identity a) (identity b) =
?b
 apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
C: category
a, b: C
CC: BinCoproduct a b
identity b · BinCoproductIn2 CC = BinCoproductIn2 CC

    apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
C ⟦ CC, CC' ⟧


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
C ⟦ CC, CC' ⟧

  apply (BinCoproductArrow CC  (BinCoproductIn1 _ ) (BinCoproductIn2 _ )).
Defined.


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC')
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC)


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC')
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC)

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC =
identity CC
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC' =
identity CC'

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC =
identity CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
identity CC =
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC

    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC) =
BinCoproductIn1 CC
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC) =
BinCoproductIn2 CC

    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC) =
BinCoproductIn1 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC =
BinCoproductIn1 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC
· BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC')
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC')
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC) = BinCoproductIn1 CC

      
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC) = BinCoproductIn1 CC

      
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC = BinCoproductIn1 CC

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC) =
BinCoproductIn2 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC =
BinCoproductIn2 CC
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC
· BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC')
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC')
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC) = BinCoproductIn2 CC

      
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC'
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC) = BinCoproductIn2 CC

      
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC = BinCoproductIn2 CC

      apply idpath.
  
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC' =
identity CC'
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
identity CC' =
from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
· from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'

    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC') =
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC') =
BinCoproductIn2 CC'

    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC') =
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn1 CC'
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC)
· BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC')
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC') = BinCoproductIn1 CC'

      repeat rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes; apply idpath.
    
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC'
· (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC') =
BinCoproductIn2 CC'
 
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
BinCoproductIn2 CC'
· BinCoproductArrow CC' (BinCoproductIn1 CC)
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC)
· BinCoproductArrow CC (BinCoproductIn1 CC')
    (BinCoproductIn2 CC') = BinCoproductIn2 CC'

      repeat rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes; apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC')


C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC')

  
C: category
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC')
  (from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC' CC)

  apply is_inverse_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct.
Defined.

Definition z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct {a b : C} (CC CC' : BinCoproduct a b)
  : z_iso (BinCoproductObject CC) (BinCoproductObject CC')
  := _ ,, is_z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct CC CC'.


End coproduct_def.

Arguments BinCoproduct [_] _ _.
Arguments BinCoproductObject [_ _ _] _ .
Arguments BinCoproductArrow [_ _ _] _ [_] _ _.
Arguments BinCoproductIn1 [_ _ _] _.
Arguments BinCoproductIn2 [_ _ _] _.

(** * Proof that coproducts are unique when the precategory [C] is a univalent_category *)

Section coproduct_unique.

Context (C : category) (H : is_univalent C) (a b : C).


C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
isaprop (BinCoproduct a b)


C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
isaprop (BinCoproduct a b)

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
isProofIrrelevant (BinCoproduct a b)

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
CC = CC'

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧,
   isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x))
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
pr1 CC = pr1 CC'

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧,
   isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x))
 
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧,
   isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x))

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
x: ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isaprop
  (isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x))
 do 3 (apply impred; intro); apply isapropiscontr.
  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
pr1 CC = pr1 CC'
 
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
transportf (λ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧)
  (isotoid C H
     (z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC CC'))
  (pr21 CC) = pr21 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
make_dirprod
  (transportf (λ a0 : C, C ⟦ a, a0 ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC
           CC')) (pr121 CC))
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC
           CC')) (pr221 CC)) = pr21 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
make_dirprod
  (pr121 CC
   · z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC CC')
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC
           CC')) (pr221 CC)) = pr21 CC'
 
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
make_dirprod
  (pr121 CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC CC')
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC
           CC')) (pr221 CC)) = pr21 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC, CC': BinCoproduct a b
make_dirprod
  (pr121 CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC CC')
  (pr221 CC
   · z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C CC CC') =
pr21 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC: ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 CC) (pr12 CC) (pr22 CC)
CC': BinCoproduct a b
make_dirprod
  (pr121 (CC,, bla)
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C (CC,, bla)
       CC')
  (pr221 (CC,, bla)
   · z_iso_from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C
       (CC,, bla) CC') = pr21 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b: C
CC: ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 CC) (pr12 CC) (pr22 CC)
CC': ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 CC') 
  (pr12 CC') (pr22 CC')
make_dirprod
  (pr12 CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C (CC,, bla)
       (CC',, bla'))
  (pr22 CC
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C (CC,, bla)
       (CC',, bla')) = pr2 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, CC: C
CC1: C ⟦ a, CC ⟧
CC2: C ⟦ b, CC ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 (CC,, CC1,, CC2)) (pr12 (CC,, CC1,, CC2))
(pr22 (CC,, CC1,, CC2))
CC': ∑ co : C, C ⟦ a, co ⟧ × C ⟦ b, co ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b (pr1 CC') 
  (pr12 CC') (pr22 CC')
make_dirprod
  (pr12 (CC,, CC1,, CC2)
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C
       ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla) (CC',, bla'))
  (pr22 (CC,, CC1,, CC2)
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C
       ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla) (CC',, bla')) =
pr2 CC'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, CC: C
CC1: C ⟦ a, CC ⟧
CC2: C ⟦ b, CC ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b CC CC1 CC2
CC': C
CC1': C ⟦ a, CC' ⟧
CC2': C ⟦ b, CC' ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b CC' CC1' CC2'
make_dirprod
  (CC1
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C
       ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla)
       ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
  (CC2
   · from_BinCoproduct_to_BinCoproduct C
       ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla)
       ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla')) = CC1',, CC2'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, CC: C
CC1: C ⟦ a, CC ⟧
CC2: C ⟦ b, CC ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b CC CC1 CC2
CC': C
CC1': C ⟦ a, CC' ⟧
CC2': C ⟦ b, CC' ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b CC' CC1' CC2'
make_dirprod
  (CC1
   · BinCoproductArrow ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla)
       (BinCoproductIn1 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
       (BinCoproductIn2 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla')))
  (CC2
   · BinCoproductArrow ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla)
       (BinCoproductIn1 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
       (BinCoproductIn2 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))) =
CC1',, CC2'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, CC: C
CC1: C ⟦ a, CC ⟧
CC2: C ⟦ b, CC ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b CC CC1 CC2
CC': C
CC1': C ⟦ a, CC' ⟧
CC2': C ⟦ b, CC' ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b CC' CC1' CC2'
make_dirprod
  (BinCoproductIn1 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
  (CC2
   · BinCoproductArrow ((CC,, CC1,, CC2),, bla)
       (BinCoproductIn1 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
       (BinCoproductIn2 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))) =
CC1',, CC2'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, CC: C
CC1: C ⟦ a, CC ⟧
CC2: C ⟦ b, CC ⟧
bla: isBinCoproduct C a b CC CC1 CC2
CC': C
CC1': C ⟦ a, CC' ⟧
CC2': C ⟦ b, CC' ⟧
bla': isBinCoproduct C a b CC' CC1' CC2'
make_dirprod
  (BinCoproductIn1 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla'))
  (BinCoproductIn2 ((CC',, CC1',, CC2'),, bla')) =
CC1',, CC2'

    apply idpath.
Qed.

End coproduct_unique.


C: univalent_category
isaprop (BinCoproducts C)


C: univalent_category
isaprop (BinCoproducts C)

  
C: univalent_category
x: C
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : C, ∏ b : C, BinCoproduct t b) x)

  
C: univalent_category
x, y: C
isofhlevel 1 (BinCoproduct x y)

  
C: univalent_category
x, y: C
is_univalent C

  exact (univalent_category_is_univalent C).
Qed.

Section BinCoproducts.

Context (C : category) (CC : BinCoproducts C) (a b c d x y : C).


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ CC a b, c ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f'
→ BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f =
  BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f' → f = f'


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ CC a b, c ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f'
→ BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f =
  BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f' → f = f'

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ CC a b, c ⟧
Hyp1: BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f'
Hyp2: BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f'
f = f'

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ CC a b, c ⟧
Hyp1: BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f'
Hyp2: BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f'
BinCoproductArrow (CC a b)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f) = f'

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ CC a b, c ⟧
Hyp1: BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f'
Hyp2: BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f'
BinCoproductArrow (CC a b)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f) =
BinCoproductArrow (CC a b)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b) · f')
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b) · f')

  apply maponpaths_12; assumption.
Qed.

(** specialized versions of beta rules for coproducts *)
(* all the following lemmas for manipulation of the hypothesis
Lemma BinCoproductIn1Commutes_left (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : a --> c):
  BinCoproductIn1 C (CC _ _) · BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g = h -> f = h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : a --> c):
  h = BinCoproductIn1 C (CC _ _) · BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g -> h = f.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn2Commutes_left (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : b --> c):
  BinCoproductIn2 C (CC _ _) · BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g = h -> g = h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : b --> c):
  h = BinCoproductIn2 C (CC _ _) · BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g -> h = g.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn1Commutes_left_in_ctx (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : c --> d)(h' : a --> d):
  BinCoproductIn1 C (CC _ _) · (BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g · h) = h' -> f · h = h'.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite assoc in Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn1Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_in_ctx (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : c --> d)(h' : a --> d):
  h' = BinCoproductIn1 C (CC _ _) · (BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g · h)  -> h' = f · h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0 in Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0.
  exact (BinCoproductIn1Commutes_left_in_ctx _ _ _ _ Hyp).
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn2Commutes_left_in_ctx (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : c --> d)(h' : b --> d):
  BinCoproductIn2 C (CC _ _) · (BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g · h) = h' -> g · h = h'.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite assoc in Hyp.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes in Hyp.
  exact Hyp.
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_ctx (f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)(h : c --> d)(h' : b --> d):
  h' = BinCoproductIn2 C (CC _ _) · (BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g · h)  -> h' = g · h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0 in Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0.
  exact (BinCoproductIn2Commutes_left_in_ctx _ _ _ _ Hyp).
Qed.

Lemma BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_double_ctx (g0 : x --> b)(f : a --> c)(g : b --> c)
 (h : c --> d)(h' : x --> d):
  h' = g0 · BinCoproductIn2 C (CC _ _) · (BinCoproductArrow C (CC _ _) f g · h)  ->
  h' = g0 · g · h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite Hyp.
  repeat rewrite <- assoc.
  apply maponpaths.
  rewrite assoc.
  rewrite BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
  apply idpath.
Qed.
*)


(* optimized versions in direct style *)

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
h = f
→ h =
  BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
  · BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
h = f
→ h =
  BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
  · BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
Hyp: h = f
h =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
Hyp: h = f
f =
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
Hyp: h = f
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g = f

  apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h = g
→ h =
  BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
  · BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h = g
→ h =
  BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
  · BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hyp: h = g
h =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hyp: h = g
g =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hyp: h = g
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g = g

  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C ⟦ a, d ⟧
h' = f · h
→ h' =
  BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
  · (BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h)


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C

g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧

Hyp: h' = f · h
f · h =

· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C ⟦ a, d ⟧
Hyp: h' = f · h
f · h = f · h

  apply idpath.
Qed.

  · (BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h) = h'

Hyp: g · h = h'

  apply idpath.

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
g0: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C ⟦ x, d ⟧
h' = g0 · f · h
→ h' =
  g0 · BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
  · (BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h)

CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C

f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧

g · h =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· (BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h)

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
g0: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C ⟦ x, d ⟧
Hyp: h' = g0 · g · h
g · h =
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductArrow (CC a b) f g · h

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
g0: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C ⟦ x, d ⟧
Hyp: h' = g0 · g · h
g · h = g · h

  apply idpath.
Qed.
(** end of specialized versions of the beta laws for coproducts *)


(* do we ever want to create a multitude of similar lemmas for other rewrite rules?
Lemma id_left_to_the_right (C': precategory)(a b : C')(f h : C' ⟦ a, b ⟧): h = f -> h = identity a· f.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0, id_left.
Qed.

Lemma id_left_to_the_right_in_ctx (C': precategory)(a b c: C')(f : C' ⟦ a, b ⟧)(g : C' ⟦ b, c ⟧)
  (h : C' ⟦ a, c ⟧): h = f · g -> h = identity a · f · g.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite Hyp.
  rewrite id_left.
  apply idpath.
Qed.


Lemma assoc_to_the_right (C' : precategory) (a b c d : C') (f : C' ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : C' ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : C' ⟦ c, d ⟧)(res: C' ⟦ a, d ⟧) : res = f· g· h -> res = f· (g· h).
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite Hyp.
  apply pathsinv0, assoc.
Qed.

Lemma assoc_back_to_the_right (C' : precategory) (a b c d : C') (f : C' ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : C' ⟦ b, c ⟧) (h : C' ⟦ c, d ⟧)(res: C' ⟦ a, d ⟧) : res = f· (g· h) -> res = f· g· h.
Proof.
  intro Hyp.
  rewrite Hyp.
  apply assoc.
Qed.
*)


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC x y) (f · g)
  (f' · g')


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC x y) (f · g)
  (f' · g')

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f · BinCoproductIn1 (CC c d)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f
· (BinCoproductIn1 (CC c d)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f · (g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)) =
f · g · BinCoproductIn1 (CC x y)

    apply assoc.
  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (CC a b)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC c d) f f'
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC c d)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g' =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f'
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CC c d)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC x y) g g') =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
f' · (g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)) =
f' · g' · BinCoproductIn2 (CC x y)

    apply assoc.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
fk: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
gh: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
fk = f · k
→ gh = g · h
  → BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
    · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
    BinCoproductArrow CCab fk gh


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
fk: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
gh: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
fk = f · k
→ gh = g · h
  → BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
    · BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
    BinCoproductArrow CCab fk gh

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
fk: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
gh: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
H: fk = f · k
H': gh = g · h
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab fk gh

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
fk: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
gh: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
H: fk = f · k
H': gh = g · h
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) gh

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
CCab: BinCoproduct a b
CCcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, x ⟧
fk: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
gh: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
H: fk = f · k
H': gh = g · h
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)

  apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow.
Qed.

End BinCoproducts.

(** * Binary coproducts from colimits *)
Section BinCoproducts_from_Colims.

Context (C : category).

Definition two_graph : graph := (bool,,λ _ _,empty).


C: category
a, b: C
diagram two_graph C


C: category
a, b: C
diagram two_graph C


C: category
a, b: C
∏ a0 b0 : vertex two_graph,
edge a0 b0
→ C ⟦ if a0 then a else b, if b0 then a else b ⟧

abstract (intros u v F; induction F).
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
cocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b) c


C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
cocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b) c


C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ v : vertex two_graph,
C ⟦ dob (bincoproduct_diagram a b) v, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
forms_cocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b) ?f


C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ v : vertex two_graph,
C ⟦ dob (bincoproduct_diagram a b) v, c ⟧
 intros x; induction x; assumption.

C: category
a, b, c: C
ac: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
bc: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
forms_cocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
  (λ x : vertex two_graph,
   bool_rect
     (λ x0 : bool,
      C ⟦ dob (bincoproduct_diagram a b) x0, c ⟧) ac
     bc x)
 abstract (intros x y e; destruct e).
Defined.


C: category
Colims_of_shape two_graph C → BinCoproducts C


C: category
Colims_of_shape two_graph C → BinCoproducts C


C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
BinCoproduct a b


C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
BinCoproduct a b


C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ a, ?c ⟧
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ b, ?c ⟧
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
isBinCoproduct C a b ?c ?f ?g


C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C
 apply (colim CC).

C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ a, colim CC ⟧
 apply (colimIn CC true).

C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ b, colim CC ⟧
 apply (colimIn CC false).

C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
isBinCoproduct C a b (colim CC) (colimIn CC true)
  (colimIn CC false)
 
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∃! k : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
colimIn CC true · k = f × colimIn CC false · k = g

  
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
 colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g)
  ?x
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
    colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g)
     y)
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
 colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g) y
→ y = ?x

  
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
 apply colimArrow, (BinCoprod f g).
  
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
 colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g)
  (colimArrow CC c (BinCoprod f g))
 abstract (split;
      [ apply (colimArrowCommutes CC c (BinCoprod f g) true)
      | apply (colimArrowCommutes CC c (BinCoprod f g) false) ]).
  
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
    colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g)
     y)
 abstract (intros h; apply isapropdirprod; apply C).
  
C: category
H: Colims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
CC:= H (bincoproduct_diagram a b): ColimCocone (bincoproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧,
 colimIn CC true · t = f × colimIn CC false · t = g) y
→ y = colimArrow CC c (BinCoprod f g)
 abstract (now intros h [H1 H2]; apply colimArrowUnique; intro x; induction x).
Defined.

End BinCoproducts_from_Colims.

(** * Coproducts over bool from binary coproducts *)
Section CoproductsBool.


C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
Coproducts bool C


C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
Coproducts bool C


C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
Coproduct bool C H


C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
C
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, ?c ⟧
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
isCoproduct bool C H ?c ?f


C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
C
 apply (HC (H true) (H false)).

C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
∏ i : bool,
C ⟦ H i,
let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧
 induction i; apply (pr1 (HC (H true) (H false))).

C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
isCoproduct bool C H
  (let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
  (λ i : bool,
   bool_rect
     (λ i0 : bool,
      C ⟦ H i0,
      let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
     (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
     (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i)
 
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
∃! k : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
∏ i : bool,
(λ i0 : bool,
 bool_rect
   (λ i1 : bool,
    C ⟦ H i1,
    let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
   (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
   (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · k = f i

  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
∃! k : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
∏ i : bool,
(λ i0 : bool,
 bool_rect
   (λ i1 : bool,
    C ⟦ H i1,
    let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
   (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
   (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
    let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · k = f i

  (* induction (pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c (f true) (f false)) as [[x1 [x2 x3]] x4]. *)
  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
C
⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
  let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
(λ t : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
 ∏ i : bool,
 (λ i0 : bool,
  bool_rect
    (λ i1 : bool,
     C ⟦ H i1,
     let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · t = 
 f i) ?x
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
∏
y : C
    ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C
          ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
    ∏ i : bool,
    (λ i0 : bool,
     bool_rect
       (λ i1 : bool,
        C ⟦ H i1,
        let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
       (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
       (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · t = 
    f i) y)

HC: BinCoproducts C

c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
∏
y : C
    ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
(λ t : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
 ∏ i : bool,
 (λ i0 : bool,
  bool_rect
    (λ i1 : bool,
     C ⟦ H i1,
     let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in

    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
