 f i) y → y = ?x

  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
C
⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
  let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧
 exact (pr1 (pr1 uniqex)).
  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
(λ t : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
 ∏ i : bool,
 (λ i0 : bool,
  bool_rect
    (λ i1 : bool,
     C ⟦ H i1,
     let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · t = f i)
  (pr11 uniqex)
 abstract (cbn; induction i;
              [exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 uniqex))) | exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 uniqex)))]).
  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
∏
y : C
    ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C
          ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
    ∏ i : bool,
    (λ i0 : bool,
     bool_rect
       (λ i1 : bool,
        C ⟦ H i1,
        let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
       (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
       (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
        let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · t = f i) y)
 abstract (intros x; apply impred; intros; apply C).
  
C: category
HC: BinCoproducts C
H: bool → C
c: C
f: ∏ i : bool, C ⟦ H i, c ⟧
uniqex:= pr2 (HC (H true) (H false)) c 
  (f true) (f false): ∃! fg : C ⟦ pr11 (HC (H true) (H false)), c ⟧,
pr121 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg = f true
× pr221 (HC (H true) (H false)) · fg =
  f false
∏
y : C
    ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
(λ t : C
       ⟦ let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0, c ⟧,
 ∏ i : bool,
 (λ i0 : bool,
  bool_rect
    (λ i1 : bool,
     C ⟦ H i1,
     let X := pr1 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0 ⟧)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
    (let X := pr21 (HC (H true) (H false)) in
     let X0 := pr2 X in X0) i0) i · t = f i) y
→ y = pr11 uniqex
 abstract (intros h1 h2;
              apply (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 uniqex (h1,,(h2 true,,h2 false))))).
Defined.


C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
BinCoproducts C


C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
BinCoproducts C

  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
BinCoproduct x y

  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, ?c ⟧
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C ⟦ y, ?c ⟧
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
isBinCoproduct C x y ?c ?f ?g

  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C
 exact (HC (λ b, if b then x else y)).
  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y) ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn _ _ _ true).
  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
C ⟦ y, HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y) ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn _ _ _ false).
  
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y: C
isBinCoproduct C x y
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y))
  (CoproductIn bool C
     (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true)
  (CoproductIn bool C
     (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false)
 
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧,
CoproductIn bool C
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · fg = g₁
× CoproductIn bool C
    (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false · fg =
  g₂

    
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fg : C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧,
   CoproductIn bool C
     (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · fg =
   g₁
   × CoproductIn bool C
       (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false
     · fg = g₂)
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧,
CoproductIn bool C
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · fg = g₁
× CoproductIn bool C
    (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false · fg =
  g₂

    
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   fg : C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧,
   CoproductIn bool C
     (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · fg =
   g₁
   × CoproductIn bool C
       (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false
     · fg = g₂)
 abstract
        (use invproofirrelevance ;
         intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property | ] ;
         use CoproductArrow_eq ;
         intro b ;
         induction b ; [ exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂)) | ] ;
         exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂))).
    
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧,
CoproductIn bool C
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · fg = g₁
× CoproductIn bool C
    (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false · fg =
  g₂
 
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
CoproductIn bool C
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true · ?pr1 =
g₁
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : CoproductIn bool C
         (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true
       · ?pr1 = g₁,
 CoproductIn bool C
   (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false · ?pr1 =
 g₂) ?pr10

      
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y), w ⟧
 
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∏ i : bool, C ⟦ if i then x else y, w ⟧

        
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ x, w ⟧
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ y, w ⟧

        
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ x, w ⟧
 exact g₁.
        
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ y, w ⟧
 exact g₂.
      
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
CoproductIn bool C
  (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true
· CoproductArrow bool C
    (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y))
    (λ b : bool,
     bool_rect
       (λ b0 : bool, C ⟦ if b0 then x else y, w ⟧) g₁
       g₂ b) = g₁
 abstract
          (exact (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ true)).
      
C: category
HC: Coproducts bool C
x, y, w: C
g₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : CoproductIn bool C
         (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) true
       · CoproductArrow bool C
           (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y))
           (λ b : bool,
            bool_rect
              (λ b0 : bool,
               C ⟦ if b0 then x else y, w ⟧) g₁ g₂ b) =
       g₁,
 CoproductIn bool C
   (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y)) false
 · CoproductArrow bool C
     (HC (λ b : bool, if b then x else y))
     (λ b : bool,
      bool_rect
        (λ b0 : bool, C ⟦ if b0 then x else y, w ⟧) g₁
        g₂ b) = g₂)
  (BinCoproducts_from_Coproducts_subproof0 C HC x y w
     g₁ g₂)
 abstract
          (exact (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ false)).
Defined.
End CoproductsBool.

Section functors.


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_data (category_binproduct C C) C


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_data (category_binproduct C C) C


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
category_binproduct C C → C
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
(λ F : category_binproduct C C → C,
 ∏ a b : category_binproduct C C,
 category_binproduct C C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
category_binproduct C C → C
 
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
p: category_binproduct C C
C

  apply (BinCoproductObject (PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p))).

C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
(λ F : category_binproduct C C → C,
 ∏ a b : category_binproduct C C,
 category_binproduct C C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ p : category_binproduct C C, PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p))
 
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
p, q: category_binproduct C C
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ p, q ⟧
C ⟦ PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p), PC (pr1 q) (pr2 q) ⟧

  apply (BinCoproductOfArrows _ (PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p))
                             (PC (pr1 q) (pr2 q)) (pr1 f) (pr2 f)).
Defined.

(* The binary coproduct functor: C * C -> C *)


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_functor (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_functor (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)

  
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_idax (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_compax (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)

  
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_idax (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)
 
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
x: category_binproduct C C
identity (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
  (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (identity (pr1 x))
  (identity (pr2 x))

    
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
x: category_binproduct C C
BinCoproductIn1 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
    (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (identity (pr1 x))
    (identity (pr2 x)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
x: category_binproduct C C
BinCoproductIn2 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
    (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (identity (pr1 x))
    (identity (pr2 x)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

    
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
x: category_binproduct C C
BinCoproductIn1 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
    (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (identity (pr1 x))
    (identity (pr2 x)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
 now rewrite BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1, id_left.
    
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
x: category_binproduct C C
BinCoproductIn2 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
    (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (identity (pr1 x))
    (identity (pr2 x)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (PC (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
 now rewrite BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2, id_left.
  
C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
functor_compax (bincoproduct_functor_data PC)
  now intros x y z f g; simpl; rewrite BinCoproductOfArrows_comp.
Qed.

Definition bincoproduct_functor {C : category} (PC : BinCoproducts C)
  : functor (category_binproduct C C) C
  := make_functor _ (is_functor_bincoproduct_functor_data PC).

(* Defines the coproduct of two functors *)
Definition BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt {C D : category}
           (HD : BinCoproducts D) (F G : C ⟶ D) : C ⟶ D :=
    tuple_functor (λ b, bool_rect (λ _, C ⟶ D) F G b) ∙
    coproduct_functor bool (CoproductsBool HD).

(* Defines the coproduct of two functors by:
    x -> (x,x) -> (F x,G x) -> F x + G x

  For a direct and equal definition see FunctorsPointwiseBinCoproduct.v (seems obsolete)

  Above is a slightly simpler definition
*)
Definition BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 {C D : category}
  (HD : BinCoproducts D) (F G : functor C D) : functor C D :=
    bindelta_functor C ∙ (pair_functor F G ∙ bincoproduct_functor HD).

End functors.

(** In the following section we show that if the morphisms to components are
    zero, then the unique morphism factoring through the bincoproduct is the
    zero morphism. *)
Section BinCoproduct_zeroarrow.

  Context (C : category) (Z : Zero C).

  
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f = ZeroArrow Z x z
→ g = ZeroArrow Z y z
  → BinCoproductArrow BP f g = ZeroArrow Z BP z

  
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f = ZeroArrow Z x z
→ g = ZeroArrow Z y z
  → BinCoproductArrow BP f g = ZeroArrow Z BP z

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductArrow BP f g = ZeroArrow Z BP z
 
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
ZeroArrow Z BP z = BinCoproductArrow BP f g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn1 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z = f
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn2 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z = g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn1 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z =
ZeroArrow Z x z
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn2 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z = g
 
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn2 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z = g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z x z
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z y z
BinCoproductIn2 BP · ZeroArrow Z BP z =
ZeroArrow Z y z
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

End BinCoproduct_zeroarrow.


(** Goal: lift coproducts from the target (pre)category to the functor (pre)category *)

Section def_functor_pointwise_coprod.

Context (C D : category) (HD : BinCoproducts D).

Section BinCoproduct_of_functors.

Context (F G : functor C D).

Local Notation "c ⊗ d" := (BinCoproductObject (HD c d)).

Definition BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob (c : C) : D := F c ⊗ G c.

Definition BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor (c c' : C) (f : c --> c')
  : BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob c --> BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob c'
  := BinCoproductOfArrows _ _ _ (#F f) (#G f).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_data C D


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_data C D

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ D ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob a,
  BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob b ⟧

  exact BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor.
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_functor BinCoproduct_of_functors_data


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_functor BinCoproduct_of_functors_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_idax BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_compax BinCoproduct_of_functors_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_idax BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
identity (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob a)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
identity (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob a) =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F (identity a))
    (# G (identity a)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
# F (identity a) · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
identity (F a) · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F a) (G a))

      apply id_left.
    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F (identity a))
    (# G (identity a)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
# G (identity a) · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
identity (G a) · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F a) (G a))

      apply id_left.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_compax BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a c (f · g) =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a b f
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor b c g

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F (f · g)) (# G (f · g)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F g) (# G g)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F f · # F g) (# G f · # G g) =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F g) (# G g)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F g) (# G g) =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F g) (# G g)

    apply idpath.
(* former proof:
    unfold BinCoproductOfArrows.
    apply pathsinv0.
    apply BinCoproductArrowUnique.
    + rewrite assoc. simpl in *.
      set (H:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes ).
      set (H2 := H D _ _ (HD (F a) (G a))).
      rewrite H2.
      rewrite <- assoc.
      rewrite functor_comp.
      repeat rewrite <- assoc.
      apply maponpaths.
      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
    + rewrite assoc.
      set (H:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes D _ _ (HD (F a) (G a))).
      rewrite H.
      rewrite functor_comp.
      repeat rewrite <- assoc.
      apply maponpaths.
      apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
*)
Qed.

Definition BinCoproduct_of_functors : functor C D :=
  tpair _ _ is_functor_BinCoproduct_of_functors_data.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors

now apply (functor_eq _ _ D).
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors

now apply (functor_eq _ _ D).
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 HD F G


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 HD F G

now apply (functor_eq _ _ D).
Qed.

Definition coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data : ∏ c, F c --> BinCoproduct_of_functors c
  := λ c : C, BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c)).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans F BinCoproduct_of_functors
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans F BinCoproduct_of_functors
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data x' =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data x
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# F f · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data c' =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data c
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· # (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data,,
     is_functor_BinCoproduct_of_functors_data) f
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor c c' f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
X2: ∏ (f : D ⟦ F c, F c' ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, G c' ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c'))
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = f · BinCoproductIn1 CCcd
X2: ∏ (f : D ⟦ F c, F c' ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, G c' ⟧),
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) f g =
f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c'))
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
# F f · BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c') (G c'))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition coproduct_nat_trans_in1 : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data.

Definition coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data : ∏ c, G c --> BinCoproduct_of_functors c
  := λ c : C, BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c)).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans G BinCoproduct_of_functors
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans G BinCoproduct_of_functors
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# G f · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data x' =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data x
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# G f · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data c' =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data c
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· # BinCoproduct_of_functors f

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· # (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data,,
     is_functor_BinCoproduct_of_functors_data) f
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor c c' f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
X2: ∏ (f : D ⟦ F c, F c' ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, G c' ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c'))
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) (# F f) (# G f)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
XX: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 CCab
· BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
X1: ∏ (c0 d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c0 d)
(f : D ⟦ F c, c0 ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, d ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) CCcd f
    g = g · BinCoproductIn2 CCcd
X2: ∏ (f : D ⟦ F c, F c' ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G c, G c' ⟧),
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c))
· BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F c') (G c')) f g =
g · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c'))
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c')) =
# G f · BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c') (G c'))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition coproduct_nat_trans_in2 : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data.


Section vertex.

(** The coproduct morphism of a diagram with vertex [A] *)

Context (A : functor C D) (f : F ⟹ A) (g : G ⟹ A).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ c : C, D ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors c, A c ⟧


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ c : C, D ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors c, A c ⟧

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
D ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors c, A c ⟧

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
D ⟦ F c, A c ⟧

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
D ⟦ G c, A c ⟧

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
D ⟦ F c, A c ⟧
 exact (f c).

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
D ⟦ G c, A c ⟧
 exact (g c).
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
is_nat_trans BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_data


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
is_nat_trans BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# BinCoproduct_of_functors k
· coproduct_nat_trans_data b =
coproduct_nat_trans_data a · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor a b k
· coproduct_nat_trans_data b =
coproduct_nat_trans_data a · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data b =
coproduct_nat_trans_data a · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c d)
(f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, d ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧) (h : D ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · h)
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c d)
(f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, d ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧) (h : D ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · h)
X2:= X1 (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (f : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ F b, x ⟧) (h : D ⟦ G b, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) f g
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) k h =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · h)
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F k) (# G k)
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c d : C)
(CCcd : BinCoproduct c d) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows C CCab CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · h)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c d : D) (CCcd : BinCoproduct c d)
(f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, d ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧) (h : D ⟦ d, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) CCcd f g
· BinCoproductArrow CCcd k h =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · h)
X2:= X1 (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (f : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ F b, x ⟧) (h : D ⟦ G b, x ⟧),
BinCoproductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a))
  (HD (F b) (G b)) f g
· BinCoproductArrow (HD (F b) (G b)) k h =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · h)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k · f b)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k · f b)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : C)
(k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k · f b)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : C)
(k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c : D) (f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, c ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · k)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k · f b)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a) · # A k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : C)
(k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c : D) (f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, c ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · k)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k · f b)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a · # A k)
  (g a · # A k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : C)
(k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c : D) (f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, c ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · k)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a · # A k)
  (# G k · g b) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a · # A k)
  (g a · # A k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinCoproductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (a b : C)
(CCab : BinCoproduct a b) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : C)
(k : C ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow CCab f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow CCab (f · k) (g · k)
X1:= XX D (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (c : D) (f : D ⟦ F a, c ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, c ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ c, x ⟧),
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) f g · k =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f · k)
  (g · k)
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a · # A k)
  (g a · # A k) =
BinCoproductArrow (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a · # A k)
  (g a · # A k)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition coproduct_nat_trans : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_coproduct_nat_trans_data.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
nat_trans_comp F BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1 coproduct_nat_trans = f


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
nat_trans_comp F BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1 coproduct_nat_trans = f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
has_homsets D
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1 coproduct_nat_trans x = 
f x

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1 coproduct_nat_trans x = 
f x
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data c = f c

    apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
nat_trans_comp G BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2 coproduct_nat_trans = g


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
nat_trans_comp G BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2 coproduct_nat_trans = g

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
has_homsets D
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp G BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2 coproduct_nat_trans x = 
g x

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp G BinCoproduct_of_functors A
  coproduct_nat_trans_in2 coproduct_nat_trans x = 
g x
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data c = g c

    apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.

End vertex.



C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], A ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], A ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors : [C, D], A
         ⟧,
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1
     :
     [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
    · fg = f
    × (coproduct_nat_trans_in2
       :
       [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
      · fg = g,
t =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], A ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], A ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors : [C, D], A
         ⟧,
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1
     :
     [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
    · fg = f
    × (coproduct_nat_trans_in2
       :
       [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
      · fg = g,
t =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], A ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], A ⟧
t: ∑
fg : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors : [C, D], A
     ⟧,
(coproduct_nat_trans_in1
 :
 [C, D] ⟦ F : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
· fg = f
× (coproduct_nat_trans_in2
   :
   [C, D] ⟦ G : [C, D], BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧)
  · fg = g
t =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t: ∑ fg : BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · fg = f
× coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · fg = g
t =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
t1,, ta,, tb =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)

f: F ⟹ A

tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g

t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
isPredicate
  (λ x : BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A,
   coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · x = f
   × coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · x = g)
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
pr1 (t1,, ta,, tb) =
pr1
  (coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
   make_dirprod
     (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
     (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g))

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
isPredicate
  (λ x : BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A,
   coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · x = f
   × coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · x = g)

HD: BinCoproducts D

f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
x: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
isaprop
  (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · x = f
   × coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · x = g)

    apply isapropdirprod;
    apply isaset_nat_trans;
    apply D.

HD: BinCoproducts D

f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
has_homsets D

f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
has_homsets D
 apply D.

f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

C, D: category

f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

c: C

C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
t1 c =
(coproduct_nat_trans_data A f g,,
 is_nat_trans_coproduct_nat_trans_data A f g) c

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A

ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
t1 c = BinCoproductArrow (HD (F c) (G c)) (f c) (g c)

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
t1 c = BinCoproductArrow (HD (F c) (G c)) (f c) (g c)

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c)) · t1 c = f c
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c)) · t1 c = g c

      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (HD (F c) (G c)) · t1 c = f c
 apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise ta).
      
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: F ⟹ A
g: G ⟹ A
t1: BinCoproduct_of_functors_data ⟹ A
ta: coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · t1 = f
tb: coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · t1 = g
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (HD (F c) (G c)) · t1 c = g c
 apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise tb).
Qed.



C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct F G


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinCoproduct F G

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D]
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ F, ?c ⟧

HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ G, ?c ⟧
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
isBinCoproduct [C, D] F G ?c ?f ?g

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D]
 apply BinCoproduct_of_functors.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ F, BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧
 apply coproduct_nat_trans_in1.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ G, BinCoproduct_of_functors ⟧
 apply coproduct_nat_trans_in2.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
isBinCoproduct [C, D] F G BinCoproduct_of_functors
  coproduct_nat_trans_in1 coproduct_nat_trans_in2
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
has_homsets [C, D]
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (c : [C, D]) (f : [C, D] ⟦ F, c ⟧)
(g : [C, D] ⟦ G, c ⟧),
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors, c ⟧,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · k = f
× coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · k = g

    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
has_homsets [C, D]
 apply functor_category_has_homsets.
    
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (c : [C, D]) (f : [C, D] ⟦ F, c ⟧)
(g : [C, D] ⟦ G, c ⟧),
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors, c ⟧,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · k = f
× coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · k = g
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ F, A ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ G, A ⟧
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors, A ⟧,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · k = f
× coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · k = g

     
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ F, A ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ G, A ⟧
∏
t : ∑ k : [C, D] ⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors, A ⟧,
    coproduct_nat_trans_in1 · k = f
    × coproduct_nat_trans_in2 · k = g,
t =
coproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (coproduct_nat_trans_In1Commutes A f g)
  (coproduct_nat_trans_In2Commutes A f g)

     apply coproduct_nat_trans_univ_prop.
Defined.

End BinCoproduct_of_functors.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
BinCoproducts [C, D]


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
BinCoproducts [C, D]

  
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: [C, D]
BinCoproduct F G

  apply functor_precat_coproduct_cocone.
Defined.

End def_functor_pointwise_coprod.


Section generalized_option_functors.

Context {C : category} (CC : BinCoproducts C).

(* The functors "a + _" and "_ + a" *)
Definition constcoprod_functor1 (a : C) : functor C C :=
  BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC (constant_functor C C a) (functor_identity C).

Definition constcoprod_functor2 (a : C) : functor C C :=
  BinCoproduct_of_functors C C CC (functor_identity C) (constant_functor C C a).


Section option_functor.

Context (TC : Terminal C).
Let one : C := TerminalObject TC.

Definition option_functor : functor C C :=
  constcoprod_functor1 one.

End option_functor.

End generalized_option_functors.

(** ** Construction of isBinCoproduct from an isomorphism to BinCoproduct. *)
Section BinCoproduct_from_z_iso.

  Context (C : category).

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
  · (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
  · (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP
· (inv_from_z_iso i · (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g)) =
f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP
· (inv_from_z_iso i · i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) =
f

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP
· (identity BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f g = f

      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP
· (inv_from_z_iso i · (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g)) =
g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP
· (inv_from_z_iso i · i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) =
g

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP
· (identity BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f g) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f g = g

      apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
y0 = i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
y0 = i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · y0 =
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i
· (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · y0 =
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
inv_from_z_iso i · y0 =
inv_from_z_iso i · i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C

i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
inv_from_z_iso i · y0 =
identity BP · BinCoproductArrow BP f g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = BinCoproductArrow BP f g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn1 BP · (inv_from_z_iso i · y0) = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn2 BP · (inv_from_z_iso i · y0) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn1 BP · (inv_from_z_iso i · y0) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
 apply (dirprod_pr1 T).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn2 BP · (inv_from_z_iso i · y0) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
y0: C ⟦ z, w ⟧
T: BinCoproductIn1 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
BinCoproductIn2 BP · inv_from_z_iso i · y0 = g
 apply (dirprod_pr2 T).
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
isBinCoproduct C x y z
  (BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i)
  (BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i)

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
isBinCoproduct C x y z
  (BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i)
  (BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg = f
× BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ z, w ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = f
 × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = g)
  ?x
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
    BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t =
    f
    × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t =
      g) y0)
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = f
 × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = g)
  y0 → y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ z, w ⟧
 exact (i · (BinCoproductArrow BP f g)).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = f
 × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = g)
  (i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g)
 exact (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct_comm BP i w f g).
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms. *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
    BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t =
    f
    × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t =
      g) y0)
 abstract (intros y0; apply isapropdirprod; apply C).
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinCoproduct x y
i: z_iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = f
 × BinCoproductIn2 BP · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · t = g)
  y0 → y0 = i · BinCoproductArrow BP f g
 abstract (intros y0 T; exact (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct_unique BP i w f g y0 T)).
  Qed.

  Definition z_iso_to_BinCoproduct {x y z : C} (BP : BinCoproduct x y)
             (i : z_iso z (BinCoproductObject BP)) :
    BinCoproduct x y := make_BinCoproduct
                                  C _ _ z
                                  ((BinCoproductIn1 BP) · (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i))
                                  ((BinCoproductIn2 BP) · (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i))
                                  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct BP i).

End BinCoproduct_from_z_iso.

(** Equivalent universal property: (A --> C) × (B --> C) ≃ (A + B --> C)

 Compare to [weqfunfromcoprodtoprod].
 *)

Section EquivalentDefinition.
  Context {C : category} {a b co : ob C} (i1 : a --> co) (i2 : b --> co) .

  Definition precomp_with_injections (c : ob C) (f : co --> c) : (a --> c) × (b --> c) :=
    make_dirprod (i1 · f)  (i2 · f).

  Definition isBinCoproduct' : UU :=
    ∏ c : ob C, isweq (precomp_with_injections c).

  Definition isBinCoproduct'_weq (is : isBinCoproduct') :
    ∏ c, (co --> c) ≃ (a --> c) × (b --> c) :=
    λ a, make_weq (precomp_with_injections a) (is a).

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBinCoproduct' → isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBinCoproduct' → isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · fg = f × i2 · fg = g

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
hfiber (isBinCoproduct'_weq isBCP' c)
  (make_dirprod f g)
≃ (∑ fg : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · fg = f × i2 · fg = g)
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber (isBinCoproduct'_weq isBCP' c)
     (make_dirprod f g))

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
hfiber (isBinCoproduct'_weq isBCP' c)
  (make_dirprod f g)
≃ (∑ fg : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · fg = f × i2 · fg = g)
 
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C ⟦ co, c ⟧
precomp_with_injections c x = make_dirprod f g
≃ i1 · x = f × i2 · x = g

      
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: C ⟦ co, c ⟧
make_dirprod (i1 · x) (i2 · x) = make_dirprod f g
≃ i1 · x = f × i2 · x = g

      apply pathsdirprodweq.
    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP': isBinCoproduct'
c: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber (isBinCoproduct'_weq isBCP' c)
     (make_dirprod f g))
 apply weqproperty.
  Defined.

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2 → isBinCoproduct'

  
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2 → isBinCoproduct'

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
iscontr (hfiber (precomp_with_injections c) fg)

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∃! x : C ⟦ co, c ⟧,
make_dirprod (i1 · x) (i2 · x) = fg

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
(∑ u : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · u = pr1 fg × i2 · u = pr2 fg)
≃ (∑ x : C ⟦ co, c ⟧,
   make_dirprod (i1 · x) (i2 · x) = fg)
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∃! u : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · u = pr1 fg × i2 · u = pr2 fg

    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
(∑ u : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · u = pr1 fg × i2 · u = pr2 fg)
≃ (∑ x : C ⟦ co, c ⟧,
   make_dirprod (i1 · x) (i2 · x) = fg)
 
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
to_prod: C ⟦ co, c ⟧
(λ x : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · x = pr1 fg × i2 · x = pr2 fg)
  to_prod
≃ (λ x : C ⟦ co, c ⟧,
   make_dirprod (i1 · x) (i2 · x) = fg) to_prod

      apply invweq, pathsdirprodweq.
    
C: category
a, b, co: C
i1: C ⟦ a, co ⟧
i2: C ⟦ b, co ⟧
isBCP: isBinCoproduct C a b co i1 i2
c: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∃! u : C ⟦ co, c ⟧, i1 · u = pr1 fg × i2 · u = pr2 fg
 exact (isBCP c (pr1 fg) (pr2 fg)). (* apply universal property *)
  Defined.

  (* TODO: prove that [isBinCoproduct'_to_isBinCoproduct] is an equivalence *)

End EquivalentDefinition.

(** Match non-implicit arguments of [isBinCoproduct] *)
Arguments isBinCoproduct' _ _ _ _ _ : clear implicits.

(**
 Coproducts when the inclusions are equal
 *)

C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁' ι₂'


C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁' ι₂'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁' ι₂'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, ι₁' · fg = f × ι₂' · fg = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, ι₁' · fg = f × ι₂' · fg = g)
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, ι₁' · fg = f × ι₂' · fg = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, ι₁' · fg = f × ι₂' · fg = g)
 abstract
      (induction p₁, p₂ ;
       apply isapropifcontr ;
       apply H).
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, ι₁' · fg = f × ι₂' · fg = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ z, w ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
ι₁' · ?pr1 = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : ι₁' · ?pr1 = f, ι₂' · ?pr1 = g) ?pr10

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ z, w ⟧
 exact (BinCoproductArrow P f g).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
ι₁' · BinCoproductArrow P f g = f
 abstract
        (induction p₁ ;
         exact (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g)).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
ι₁, ι₁': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: ι₁ = ι₁'
ι₂, ι₂': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₂: ι₂ = ι₂'
H: isBinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂
P:= make_BinCoproduct C x y z ι₁ ι₂ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : ι₁' · BinCoproductArrow P f g = f,
 ι₂' · BinCoproductArrow P f g = g)
  (isBinCoproduct_eq_arrow_subproof0 C x y z ι₁ ι₁' p₁
     ι₂ H w f g)
 abstract
        (induction p₂ ;
         exact (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g)).
Defined.

(**
 Coproduct of isos
 *)
Section BinCoproductOfIsos.
  Context {C : category}
          {a b c d : C}
          (Pab : BinCoproduct a b)
          (Pcd : BinCoproduct c d)
          (f : z_iso a c)
          (g : z_iso b d).

  Let fg : BinCoproductObject Pab --> BinCoproductObject Pcd
    := BinCoproductOfArrows _ _ _ f g.

  Let fg_inv : BinCoproductObject Pcd --> BinCoproductObject Pab
    := BinCoproductOfArrows _ _ _ (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g).

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 Pab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab (inv_from_z_iso f)
       (inv_from_z_iso g)) =
BinCoproductIn1 Pab · identity Pab

Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 Pab
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab 
       (inv_from_z_iso f) 
       (inv_from_z_iso g)) =
BinCoproductIn2 Pab · identity Pab

BinCoproductIn1 Pcd
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab 
     (inv_from_z_iso f) 
     (inv_from_z_iso g)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g) =
BinCoproductIn1 Pcd · identity Pcd

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
z_iso Pab Pcd

fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧

a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d

  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
 exact fg.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
 exact fg_inv.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinCoproduct a b
Pcd: BinCoproduct c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pab Pcd f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinCoproductOfArrows C Pcd Pab
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv
 exact bincoproduct_of_z_iso_inv.
  Defined.

End BinCoproductOfIsos.

Section AssociativityOfBinaryCoproduct.

  Context {C : category} (BCP : BinCoproducts C).

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP (BCP c d) e, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP (BCP c d) e, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧

    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP c d, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ e, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧

    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP c d, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ c, c ⟧
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ d, BCP d e ⟧

      
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact (identity c).
      
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ d, BCP d e ⟧
 apply BinCoproductIn1.
    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ e, BCP c (BCP d e) ⟧
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ e, BCP d e ⟧

      apply BinCoproductIn2.
  Defined.

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP c (BCP d e), BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP c (BCP d e), BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧

BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ c, BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP d e, BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧

BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ c, BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ c, BCP c d ⟧

      apply BinCoproductIn1.
    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ BCP d e, BCP (BCP c d) e ⟧
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ d, BCP c d ⟧

BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ e, e ⟧

      
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ d, BCP c d ⟧
 apply BinCoproductIn2.
      
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
C ⟦ e, e ⟧
 exact (identity e).
  Defined.

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
is_inverse_in_precat (bincoprod_associator_data c d e)
  (bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e)

  
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
is_inverse_in_precat (bincoprod_associator_data c d e)
  (bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e)

    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
bincoprod_associator_data c d e
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
identity (BCP (BCP c d) e)
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
identity (BCP c (BCP d e))

    
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
bincoprod_associator_data c d e
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
identity (BCP (BCP c d) e)
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· (bincoprod_associator_data c d e
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· (bincoprod_associator_data c d e
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· (bincoprod_associator_data c d e
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

        
C: category

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b = BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

        
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?f'

          apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
  (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

        
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
     (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
     (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
     (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
 
C: category

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C

· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)) = ?f'

             apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category

c, d, e: C
identity c · BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

c, d, e: C

· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b
 apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category

c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e) =

· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

           apply idpath.

BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
     (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e))
   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?b

             apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

   · bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e) = ?b

c, d, e: C

· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?t2

             apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)

           apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1.
      
C: category
