· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))
· bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e = ?f'

          apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

        
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
     (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
     (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

        
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
     (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e) = ?f'

             apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn1. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data c d e) = ?b

             
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?t2

             apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP c d) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    (identity c) (BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2.
        
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
     (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCP d e) (BCP (BCP c d) e)
    (BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c d)) (identity e) = ?f'

             apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
identity e · BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP (BCP c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data c d e = ?b
 apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
BCP: BinCoproducts C
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCP d e)
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCP c (BCP d e))

           apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition bincoprod_associator (c d e : C) : z_iso (BCP (BCP c d) e) (BCP c (BCP d e))
    := bincoprod_associator_data c d e,,
         bincoprod_associatorinv_data c d e,,
         bincoprod_associator_inverses c d e.

End AssociativityOfBinaryCoproduct.

Section DistributionThroughFunctor.

  Context {C D : category} (BCPC : BinCoproducts C) (BCPD : BinCoproducts D) (F : functor C D).

  
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
D ⟦ BCPD (F c) (F c'), F (BCPC c c') ⟧

  
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
D ⟦ BCPD (F c) (F c'), F (BCPC c c') ⟧

    use BinCoproductArrow; apply #F; [apply BinCoproductIn1 | apply BinCoproductIn2 ].
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)

  
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F (pr1 cc'1)) (F (pr2 cc'1)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g)) =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F (pr1 cc'1)) (F (pr2 cc'1)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g)) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD) (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· bincoprod_antidistributor (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)
 apply pathsinv0, precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F (pr1 cc'1)) (F (pr2 cc'1)))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
   · # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g)) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (BCPD (pr1 (pair_functor F F cc'1))
     (pr2 (pair_functor F F cc'1)))
  (pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
   · # F
       (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2))))
  (pr2 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
   · # F
       (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2))))

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
pr2 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D

g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D

# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b

?b =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))
 apply functor_comp. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
# F
  (pr1 g
   · BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
· # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g =
pr1 g · BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2))

      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1)))
· # F (# (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
pr2 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))
 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D

?b =

· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =

   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) = ?b

?b =

· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
?b =
pr2 (# (pair_functor F F) g)
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))
 apply functor_comp. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
   · # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g) =
# F
  (pr2 g
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
cc'1, cc'2: category_binproduct C C
g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ cc'1, cc'2 ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'1) (pr2 cc'1))
· # (bincoproduct_functor BCPC) g =
pr2 g · BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (pr1 cc'2) (pr2 cc'2))

      apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
  Qed.

   
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· bincoprod_antidistributor (BCPC c d) e
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
bincoprod_associator_data BCPD (F c) (F d) (F e)
· # (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
    (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
       (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor c (BCPC d e)

F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· bincoprod_antidistributor (BCPC c d) e
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
bincoprod_associator_data BCPD (F c) (F d) (F e)
· # (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
    (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
       (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor c (BCPC d e)

· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b

BCPD: BinCoproducts D

c, d, e: C
?b =

C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· bincoprod_antidistributor (BCPC c d) e = ?f'

      apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (BCPD
     (pr1 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e)))
     (pr2 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e))))
  (pr1
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)))
  (pr2
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
bincoprod_associator_data BCPD (F c) (F d) (F e)
· # (bincoproduct_functor BCPD)
    (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
       (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor c (BCPC d e)

  (pr1

  (pr2

        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b

C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (BCPD
     (pr1 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e)))
     (pr2 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e))))
  (pr1
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
   · # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e))
  (pr2
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
   · # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e)) =
bincoprod_associator_data BCPD (F c) (F d) (F e)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

  (pr1

        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
   · # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e))

        (identity (F e)))

c, d, e: C

    (BCPD

       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
bincoprod_associator_data BCPD (F c) (F d) (F e)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
 apply pathsinv0, postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (BCPD
     (pr1 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e)))
     (pr2 (make_catbinprod (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e))))
  (pr1
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
   · # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e))
  (pr2
     (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
        (identity (F e)))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
   · # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e)) =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (BCPD (F c) (F d)) (F e))
  (BinCoproductOfArrows D (BCPD (F c) (F d))
     (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))) (identity (F c))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (BCPD
          (pr1
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
          (pr2
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
       (pr1
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
       (pr2
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (BCPD
          (pr1
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
          (pr2
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
       (pr1
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
       (pr2
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

    
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr1
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))) (identity (F c))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr2
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr1
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))) (identity (F c))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

F: C ⟶ D

  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows D (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))) 
  (identity (F c))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD

    (pr1

C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr1
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (identity (F c)
   · (pr1
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
   · (pr2
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

     (identity (F e)))

· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (identity (F c)
   · (pr1
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
   · (pr2
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr1
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F
    (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCPC c d)
       (BCPC c (BCPC d e)) (identity c)
       (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC d e))) =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (identity (F c)
   · (pr1
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

   · (pr2
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

       (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC d e))) = ?b

C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c d))
   · # F
       (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCPC c d)
          (BCPC c (BCPC d e)) (identity c)
          (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC d e))))
  (# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c d))
   · # F
       (BinCoproductOfArrows C (BCPC c d)
          (BCPC c (BCPC d e)) (identity c)
          (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC d e)))) =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPD (F c) (F d))
  (identity (F c)
   · (pr1
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
   · (pr2
        (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
           (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
      · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
pr2
  (catbinprodmor (bincoprod_antidistributor c d)
     (identity (F e)))
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e))
· # F (bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =

· BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (BCPD
          (pr1
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
          (pr2
             (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
       (pr1
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
       (pr2
          (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
             (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
        · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))))

           
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (BCPD
       (pr1 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e))))
       (pr2 (make_catbinprod (F c) (BCPD (F d) (F e)))))
    (pr1
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))
    (pr2
       (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
          (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
     · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

           apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· (pr2
     (catbinprodmor (identity (F c))
        (bincoprod_antidistributor d e))
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· (bincoprod_antidistributor d e
   · # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor d e
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor d e
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor d e
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))
 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?f =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPD (F d) (F e))
· bincoprod_antidistributor d e

           apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) =
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC d e))
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
?b =
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC d e))
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))

      
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
   · bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e) = ?b
 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (BCPC c d) e)
· bincoprod_associator_data BCPC c d e = ?t2

        apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C, D: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
BCPD: BinCoproducts D
F: C ⟶ D
c, d, e: C
# F
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC d e)
   · BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e))) =
# F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC d e))
· # F (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC c (BCPC d e)))

      apply functor_comp.
  Qed.

(** axiomatize extra requirements *)

  Definition bincoprod_distributor_data : UU := ∏ (c c' : C),
      F (BCPC c c') --> BCPD (F c) (F c').

  Identity Coercion bincoprod_distributor_data_funclass: bincoprod_distributor_data >-> Funclass.

  Definition bincoprod_distributor_iso_law (δ : bincoprod_distributor_data) : UU :=
    ∏ (c c' : C), is_inverse_in_precat (δ c c') (bincoprod_antidistributor c c').

  Definition bincoprod_distributor : UU := ∑ δ : bincoprod_distributor_data, bincoprod_distributor_iso_law δ.

  Definition bincoprod_distributor_to_data (δ : bincoprod_distributor) : bincoprod_distributor_data := pr1 δ.
  Coercion bincoprod_distributor_to_data : bincoprod_distributor >-> bincoprod_distributor_data.

End DistributionThroughFunctor.

Section DistributionForPrecompositionFunctor.

  Context {A B C : category} (BCPC : BinCoproducts C) (H : functor A B).

  Let BCPAC : BinCoproducts [A,C] := BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC.
  Let BCPBC : BinCoproducts [B,C] := BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC.
  Let precomp : functor [B,C] [A,C] := pre_composition_functor A B C H.

  
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
bincoprod_distributor_data BCPBC BCPAC precomp

  
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
bincoprod_distributor_data BCPBC BCPAC precomp

    
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
G1, G2: [B, C]
[A, C] ⟦ precomp (BCPBC G1 G2),
BCPAC (precomp G1) (precomp G2) ⟧

    apply nat_trans_id.
  Defined.

  
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
bincoprod_distributor_iso_law BCPBC BCPAC precomp
  precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data

  
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
bincoprod_distributor_iso_law BCPBC BCPAC precomp
  precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data

    
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
is_inverse_in_precat
  (precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G)
  (bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G)

    
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G
· bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G =
identity (precomp (BCPBC F G))
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G
· precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G =
identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))

    
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G
· bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G =
identity (precomp (BCPBC F G))
 
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
∏ x : A,
(precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G
 · bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G)
  x = identity (precomp (BCPBC F G)) x

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
(precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G
 · bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G)
  c = identity (precomp (BCPBC F G)) c

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
identity
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob A C BCPC
     (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
    (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G)
    (functor_compose H
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
identity
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob B C BCPC F G (H c))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
  (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G)
  (functor_compose H
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
  (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
  (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
identity
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob B C BCPC F G (H c))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
· coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
    (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G)
    (functor_compose H
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
· coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
    (functor_compose H F) 
    (functor_compose H G)
    (functor_compose H
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
· coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
    (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G)
    (functor_compose H
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
BinCoproductIn1 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
 apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
c: A
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
· coproduct_nat_trans_data A C BCPC
    (functor_compose H F) (functor_compose H G)
    (functor_compose H
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 B C BCPC F G))
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat A B C H
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 B C BCPC F G)) c =
BinCoproductIn2 (BCPC (F (H c)) (G (H c)))
 apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
    
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G
· precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G =
identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
 
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G
· precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G = ?b
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
?b = identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
bincoprod_antidistributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp F G
· precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
BinCoproductArrow (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G)
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G) =
identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
BinCoproductArrow (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G)
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G) = ?b
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
?b = identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))

      
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
?b = identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
 apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductArrowEta. 
A, B, C: category
BCPC: BinCoproducts C
H: A ⟶ B
BCPAC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat A C BCPC: BinCoproducts [A, C]
BCPBC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat B C BCPC: BinCoproducts [B, C]
precomp:= pre_composition_functor A B C H: [B, C] ⟶ [A, C]
F, G: [B, C]
BinCoproductArrow (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G)
  (# precomp (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPBC F G))
   · precomp_bincoprod_distributor_data F G) =
BinCoproductArrow (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
   · identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G)))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G))
   · identity (BCPAC (precomp F) (precomp G)))

      apply maponpaths_12;
        (rewrite id_right; apply (nat_trans_eq C); intro c; apply id_right).
  Qed.

  Definition precomp_bincoprod_distributor :  bincoprod_distributor BCPBC BCPAC precomp :=
    _,,precomp_bincoprod_distributor_law.


End DistributionForPrecompositionFunctor.

(** * Binary coproducts are stable under isomorphic objects *)


C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
isBinCoproduct C x y a₂ p₂ q₂


C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
isBinCoproduct C x y a₂ p₂ q₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
isBinCoproduct C x y a₂ p₂ q₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧, p₂ · fg = h₁ × q₂ · fg = h₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧, p₂ · fg = h₁ × q₂ · fg = h₂)
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧, p₂ · fg = h₁ × q₂ · fg = h₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧, p₂ · fg = h₁ × q₂ · fg = h₂)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property | ] ;
       use (cancel_z_iso' f) ;
       use (BinCoproductArrowsEq _ _ _ coprod) ; cbn ;
       [ rewrite !assoc ;
         rewrite <- !r₁ ;
         exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂))
       | rewrite !assoc ;
         rewrite <- !r₂ ;
         exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂)) ]).
  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧, p₂ · fg = h₁ × q₂ · fg = h₂
 
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
p₂ · ?pr1 = h₁
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : p₂ · ?pr1 = h₁, q₂ · ?pr1 = h₂) ?pr10

    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
C ⟦ a₂, w ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso f · BinCoproductArrow coprod h₁ h₂).
    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
p₂
· (inv_from_z_iso f · BinCoproductArrow coprod h₁ h₂) =
h₁
 abstract
        (rewrite r₁ ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ coprod)).
    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ x, a₁ ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ y, a₁ ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ x, a₂ ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ y, a₂ ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₁ a₂
r₁: p₂ = p₁ · f
r₂: q₂ = q₁ · f
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H: BinCoproduct x y
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
(λ _ : p₂
       · (inv_from_z_iso f
          · BinCoproductArrow coprod h₁ h₂) = h₁,
 q₂
 · (inv_from_z_iso f · BinCoproductArrow coprod h₁ h₂) =
 h₂)
  (isBinCoproduct_z_iso_subproof0 C x y a₁ a₂ p₁ q₁ p₂
     H f r₁ w h₁ h₂)
 abstract
        (rewrite r₂ ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ coprod)).
Defined.

Section BinCoproductOfIso.

  Context {C : category} {x1 x2 y1 y2 : C}
    (px : BinCoproduct x1 x2).

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
φ₁ = φ₂

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
φ₁ = φ₂

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · x = g1 × f2 · x = g2)
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · x = g1 × f2 · x = g2)
 
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
x: C ⟦ py, c ⟧
isaprop (f1 · x = g1 × f2 · x = g2)
 apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property. 
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2

f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i

g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂


    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2

f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i

g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
z_iso px py
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
BinCoproductIn1 px · (?g · pr1 φ₁) =
BinCoproductIn1 px · (?g · pr1 φ₂)
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
BinCoproductIn2 px · (?g · pr1 φ₁) =
BinCoproductIn2 px · (?g · pr1 φ₂)

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
z_iso px py
 exact (z_iso_inv i).
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
BinCoproductIn1 px · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁) =
BinCoproductIn1 px · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)
 
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
inv_from_z_iso i1 · (f1 · i) · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁) =
inv_from_z_iso i1 · (f1 · i) · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
inv_from_z_iso i1
· (f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁))) =
inv_from_z_iso i1
· (f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)))

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁)) =
f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂))

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁)) = ?b

x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
?b = f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂))

f1 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁)) = ?b

x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2

g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
identity py · pr1 φ₁ = ?t2

        apply id_left.

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
pr1 φ₂ = identity py · pr1 φ₂

      apply pathsinv0, id_left.
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
BinCoproductIn2 px · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁) =
BinCoproductIn2 px · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
inv_from_z_iso i2 · (f2 · i) · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁) =
inv_from_z_iso i2 · (f2 · i) · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)

inv_from_z_iso i2
· (f2 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₁))) =
inv_from_z_iso i2
· (f2 · (i · (z_iso_inv i · pr1 φ₂)))

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
pr1 φ₂ = identity py · pr1 φ₂

      apply pathsinv0, id_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
f1
· pr11 (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
          (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)) =
g1

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
f1
· pr11 (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
          (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)) =
g1

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · pr1 t = g1

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · pr1 t =
inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv i1)
· (BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · pr1 t)

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · pr1 t =
inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv i1) · BinCoproductIn1 px
· z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · pr1 t

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · pr1 t = f1 · i · inv_from_z_iso i · pr1 t

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 = f1 · i · inv_from_z_iso i

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · identity py = f1 · i · inv_from_z_iso i

    
C: category

i2: z_iso y2 x2

  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f1 · identity py = f1 · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
identity py = i · inv_from_z_iso i

    apply pathsinv0, z_iso_inv_after_z_iso.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
f2
· pr11 (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
          (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)) =
g2

x1, x2, y1, y2: C

py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f2 · pr1 t = g2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f2 · pr1 t =
inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv i2)
· (BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · pr1 t)

     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,

z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2

· z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · pr1 t

z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i

py: C

x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
has_homsets C
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ y1, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y2, c ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = f × f2 · k = g

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
has_homsets C
 apply homset_property.

f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ y1, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y2, c ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = f × f2 · k = g

g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧

x1, x2, y1, y2: C

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
isaprop (∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2)

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C

i2: z_iso y2 x2

f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2)

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
py: C
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ y1, py ⟧
f2: C ⟦ y2, py ⟧
pf1: i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px = f1 · i
pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i
c: C
g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2
φ₁ = φ₂

      apply (isbincoproduct_of_isos_uniqueness pf1 pf2).

∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2

pf2: i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px = f2 · i

g1: C ⟦ y1, c ⟧
g2: C ⟦ y2, c ⟧
t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
∑ k : C ⟦ py, c ⟧, f1 · k = g1 × f2 · k = g2

x1, x2, y1, y2: C

py: C

t:= pr1
  (z_iso_to_isBinCoproduct C px i c
     (z_iso_inv i1 · g1) (z_iso_inv i2 · g2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ py, c ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
z_iso_inv i1 · g1
× BinCoproductIn2 px · z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · fg =
  z_iso_inv i2 · g2
f2 · pr1 t = g2
 apply (isbincoproduct_of_isos_existence_in2 pf2).
  Defined.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
BinCoproduct y1 y2

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
BinCoproduct y1 y2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ y1, ?c ⟧
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ y2, ?c ⟧
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
isBinCoproduct C y1 y2 ?c ?f ?g

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C
 exact px.
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ y1, px ⟧
 exact (z_iso_inv i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px).
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ y2, px ⟧
 exact (z_iso_inv i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px).
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
px: BinCoproduct x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
isBinCoproduct C y1 y2 px
  (z_iso_inv i1 · BinCoproductIn1 px)
  (z_iso_inv i2 · BinCoproductIn2 px)
 use (isbincoproduct_of_isos px (z_iso_inv i1) (z_iso_inv i2) (identity_z_iso px))
      ; cbn ; now rewrite id_right.
  Defined.

End BinCoproductOfIso.
